title: Vanilla Graves
description: Automatically secures your inventory into a chest at your death location and sends you the exact coordinates so you can gear up and head back out.
body:
Losing hours of progress to a surprise creeper or a long fall is frustrating—but "tombstone" mods often feel out of place in a blocky world. **Vanilla Graves** offers a lightweight, lore-friendly solution that uses Minecraft's existing mechanics to protect your hard-earned gear.

#### **Key Features**

*   **Automatic Chest Placement:** Upon death, the mod checks your inventory. If you are carrying items, it instantly places a chest (or a double chest) at your feet to store everything safely.
    
*   **Death Coordinates:** No more guessing where you fell. The moment you respawn, a private message appears in your chat with the exact X, Y, and Z coordinates of your grave.
    
*   **Lava Protection:** The mod attempts to find the safest nearby spot to place the chest, preventing your items from burning away instantly.
    
*   **Minimalist & Lightweight:** No new blocks, no complex GUI, and no "magic" items. It feels like a feature Mojang forgot to add.
    

#### **How it Works**

1.  **Die:** (Try not to, but it happens!)
    
2.  **Generate:** The mod searches for air or replaceable blocks at your death site.
    
3.  **Store:** Your items are moved from your inventory into a standard Minecraft chest.
    
4.  **Recover:** Check your chat, travel to the coordinates, and grab your gear.
    

> **Note:** If you aren't carrying any items when you die, no chest will be placed to keep the world clutter-free!

***

### **Technical Details**

*   **Compatibility:** Works seamlessly with most modded biomes and dimensions.
    
*   **Server-Side:** This mod can be installed on a server without requiring players to have it on their local machines (perfect for SMPs!).
